name: Organisation And Initiative Onboarding
recommendedUse: Use as a controlled public coordination sample for whether First Nations organisations or initiatives can join Governance Commons without collecting real membership, payment, application, access-need, or private contact data.

toastmastersSampleFacts.minimumOfficerSlate: President, one Vice President, and Secretary or Secretary/Treasurer held by three different people
toastmastersSampleFacts.officialMembershipBoundary: Official membership starts only after official Toastmasters paperwork, sponsorship/payment reconciliation, and charter acceptance.

safetyRule: No real membership, address, phone, email, access-need, official application, Toastmasters member-number, payment, signature, private organisation contact, or real authority data belongs in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
